description: Lock experimental_mining_assays to Agricola-era mine-valuation fire assays, not generic blast-furnace smelting experiments.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to Agricola's 1556 De Re Metallica account of assaying ore before smelting.
The scoped practice is enabled by metallurgical fire-assay workshop methods, but both nodes share the same 1556 Agricola chronology.
The source-backed application is determining whether rock is ore worth mining and smelting.
Assay-furnace ore testing is narrower than full-scale blast-furnace iron production.
